citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:00 PM 25
February 2026. Arrived at facility and found that the Attending Veterinarian (AV) had an animal under anesthesia and was
teaching a class at the time I arrived for inspection. Asked the AV to call at the end of anesthesia to discuss optimal
hours. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.38(b) 
   
Miscellaneous. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:00 PM 25 
February 2026. Arrived at facility and found that the Attending Veterinarian (AV) had an animal under anesthesia and was 
teaching a class at the time I arrived for inspection. Asked the AV to call at the end of anesthesia to discuss optimal 
hours. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and 
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
